Site: World Youth Diplomacy MUN

Description:
World Youth Diplomacy Model United Nations (WYDMUN) is a student-led international MUN conference based in Dubai, focused on diplomacy, global issues, and leadership development.

Committees:
- World Health Organization (WHO)
- United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime (UNODC)
- United Nations Security Council (UNSC)
- United Nations Commission on the Status of Women (UNCSW)
- International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO)
- FIFA Crisis Committee

Focus:
- International relations
- Diplomacy and negotiation
- Global governance
- Youth leadership

Audience:
High school and university students interested in Model United Nations and global affairs.

Location:
Dubai, UAE

Type:
Educational event / Model United Nations conference
